RAFII & ASSOCIATES, P.C.; Atty. Rehatjit Kaur's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Kyle O'Connor.

ARGUED. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Rehatjit Kaur and Rafii and Associates, P.C., counsel of record for Plaintiff Kyle O'Connor.

Granted. Order is signed.
